name: Greedy-skill
author: AI-Greedy + PUA Framework
description: Greedy Prediction × PUA Performance × Autonomous Loop. Meta-Learning Multi-Scale Adaptive Prediction Engine with: (1) Multi-scale time windows (short/medium/long); (2) Meta-learning (MAML-style fast adaptation); (3) Attention-based strategy routing; (4) Hierarchical pattern graph (HMG); (5) CMA-ES covariance adaptation; (6) Adversarial learning; (7) Experience replay buffer; (8) Pareto multi-objective optimization.

key_innovations.meta_learning: MAML-style fast weights vs slow weights
